domain: Ojibwe Anishinaabe sweat lodge (inipi/madoodiswan purification ceremony): 4-round structure each with distinct purpose (physical purification + emotional release + spiritual connection + gratitude); 4-directional symbolism (4 directions/elements/aspects/stages); central fire pit + Grandfather/Grandmother stones + cedar steam + drum + smudge; conductor at door (trained elder) arbitrates; participants in circle; stage-gated cedar-water round-end signal
specific_mechanism: OJIBWE-SWEAT-LODGE-4-ROUND-COMPLETION-GATE: 4-stage sequential context-gating + stage-completion-required gate + 4-direction rotation + conductor master-gate + drum low-freq anchor. (1) 4-stage context-gating sequence G_1-G_2-G_3-G_4 (physical=surface tokens, emotional=affective tokens, spiritual=abstract tokens, gratitude=closure tokens); each stage gate opens only after previous stage's purification metric reaches threshold. (2) Stage-completion-required gate: at end of stage k, cedar-water completion test purification_metric_k > tau_complete must hold before next stage G_{k+1} activates. (3) 4-directional 90-degree rotation: per stage k, output attention rotated by k*90 degrees (different orientation per stage) — analog of east/south/west/north prayers. (4) Conductor-at-door master-gate: a single high-capacity conductor LLM arbitrates all gate transitions; opens next round only when conductor judges stage complete. (5) Drum-heartbeat low-freq attention-sink anchor: persistent low-frequency anchor token e_drum maintained across all 4 rounds (steady heartbeat cohesion). (6) Differs from R486 KBACH-GESTURE-VOCABULARY-GATE (gesture vocabulary, no 4-stage completion) and R499 TSHACHU-TEMP-GATED (temperature-routing, no 4-stage purification) and R511 SETO-LEELO-LEAD-IMPROV-CHORUS-FIXED-GATE (lead-chorus content-gate, no 4-stage sequence) by 4-stage sequential completion-required gate + 4-direction 90-rotation + conductor master-gate + drum-heartbeat anchor.
llm_application: OJIBWE-SWEAT-LODGE-4-ROUND-COMPLETION-GATE 4-stage sequential context-gating G_1-G_4 with stage-completion cedar-water metric > tau_complete required before next-stage gate + 4-direction k*90-degree attention rotation per stage + conductor LLM master-gate arbitration + drum-heartbeat low-freq attention-sink anchor persistent across rounds. Differs from R397. R412 BEDOUIN. R435. R444. R461 KHIPU. R474 NADIRCLAW. R486 KBACH-GESTURE (closest — gesture vocab, no 4-stage). R499 TSHACHU-TEMP-GATED (closest — temperature gating, no completion-required). R511 SETO-LEELO-LEAD-IMPROV-CHORUS-FIXED-GATE (closest — lead-chorus, no 4-stage purification). Differs from HERMES Multi-Stage Pipeline + SinkTrack Anchor + LLMOrbit Circular + State of LLMs by 4-stage completion-required gate + 4-direction rotation + conductor master-gate + drum-anchor. Differs by 4-STAGE COMPLETION GATE + 4-DIRECTION ROTATION + CONDUCTOR MASTER-GATE + DRUM ANCHOR.
novelty_claim: HERMES Multi-Stage + SinkTrack + LLMOrbit + Multi-Stage Reasoning literature cover multi-stage pipeline + attention-sink + sequential processing space. OJIBWE-SWEAT-LODGE-4-ROUND-COMPLETION-GATE adds (a) 4-stage sequential completion-required gate + (b) 4-direction 90-degree rotation + (c) conductor master-gate arbitration + (d) drum-heartbeat low-freq anchor. Recombination — borderline lookup.
